items.title: Pacers officially waived Micah Potter.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Pacers officially waived Micah Potter.

He appeared in 47 games last season with the Pacers — his first standard NBA deal — after being signed on Dec. 26 following the G League Winter Showcase.

items.title: Rozier continues to seek a job with an NBA team. His current bond terms would prevent that because of how NBA views them, his lawyer said, with ex-teammates now on 4 different teams. He's unable to play against or practice with them, per his bond terms. Judge denied the request.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: Rozier continues to seek a job with an NBA team. His current bond terms would prevent that because of how NBA views them, his lawyer said, with ex-teammates now on 4 different teams. He's unable to play against or practice with them, per his bond terms. Judge denied the request.

items.title: Spicy day in Brooklyn federal court as Terry Rozier made his latest appearance. A federal judge denied his request to remove certain ex-Hornets players + coaches from no contact list. Rozier's new lawyer has asked judge to move the case to South Florida. Trial date still Feb. 8.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: Spicy day in Brooklyn federal court as Terry Rozier made his latest appearance. A federal judge denied his request to remove certain ex-Hornets players + coaches from no contact list. Rozier's new lawyer has asked judge to move the case to South Florida. Trial date still Feb. 8.

items.title: Also very happy for my guy @timbontemps.bsky.social, my once-upon-a-time fellow beat writer on the Brooklyn Nets.
items.author: Howard Beck
items.body_excerpt:
Also very happy for my guy @timbontemps.bsky.social, my once-upon-a-time fellow beat writer on the Brooklyn Nets. 

Will miss having him in the press room, and in my earbuds. Will I miss the nagging texts demanding my MVP straw poll ballot three times a year? Eh, who's to say?

items.title: Purely a cost cutting move with no argument of making Denver a better basketball team. Gotten because of the bad MPJ trade, Denver gets one season and a future cap hit out of Jonas after the coach misused him.
items.author: Jake Shapiro
items.body_excerpt:
Purely a cost cutting move with no argument of making Denver a better basketball team. Gotten because of the bad MPJ trade, Denver gets one season and a future cap hit out of Jonas after the coach misused him.

The Nuggets are owned by the largest private land owner in the USA.

items.title: JUST IN: The Denver Nuggets are waiving center Jonas Valanciunas, league sources told HoppsHype. He had a fully guaranteed $10 million decision today. Denver will now owe Valanciunas $2 million for the 2026-27 season. He’s averaged 12.8 points and 9.0 rebounds in 14 NBA seasons.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: JUST IN: The Denver Nuggets are waiving center Jonas Valanciunas, league sources told HoppsHype. He had a fully guaranteed $10 million decision today. Denver will now owe Valanciunas $2 million for the 2026-27 season. He’s averaged 12.8 points and 9.0 rebounds in 14 NBA seasons.

items.title: Wizards General Manager Will Dawkins on Trae Young: “Trae made an immediate impact on our organization and the DMV when he arrived in January. Re-signing one of the league’s premier point guards was a top priority for us this offseason as we continue to build here in D.C.”
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Wizards General Manager Will Dawkins on Trae Young: “Trae made an immediate impact on our organization and the DMV when he arrived in January. Re-signing one of the league’s premier point guards was a top priority for us this offseason as we continue to build here in D.C.”
